text: Recent advancements in primary amine-thiourea catalysis disclosed after the first report of this methodology in 2006 are summarized. A large number of highly enantioselective catalytic reactions leading to different classes of chiral products catalyzed by primary amine-based thioureas are described. These developments demonstrate the versatility of this class of organocatalysts.
